name: MAYO Human Capital Inc.
summary: MAYO Human Capital Inc. provides human resources management solutions to various industries and enterprises. The company offers Apollo, a human resources solution that integrates functions, such as attendance punching, scheduling, leave, salary, recruitment, signing, organization, and management. It also provides STAYFUN, an employee benefits integration platform that allows the company to have choices for gifts and employee benefits. In addition, the company offers Cornerstone, an integrated cloud platform, which covers online learning modules, training goal setting, performance management and core talent data management, visual talent placement and analysis, enterprises implement talent management strategies, successor bench strength building, and perfect talent development system creation. Further, it provides customized internal training courses to companies related to professional staff-only human resource consultants; and personnel administration commission professional outsourcing services. MAYO Human Capital Inc. is headquartered in Hsinchu County, Taiwan.
